channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Collapsing floorboards, vaulting over tables, and dodging arrows — Blood Message is a cinematic adventure that looks like it could have been developed by Naughty Dog
item.description: Blood Message is a new AAA single-player story game that looks like it could become the Chinese Uncharted.

item.title: Ce forfait 5G de Free embarque trois services que ses concurrents facturent en option
item.description: À 12,99 euros par mois, la Série Free 160 Go ne se limite pas à une enveloppe de data en 5G. Elle embarque une eSIM Watch, l'accès à Free TV et un VPN mobile, trois services qui sont généralement facturés en option ailleurs.

item.title: Xbox recule et baisse le prix de ses jeux
item.description: La nouvelle génération de consoles avait fait basculer les prix à 80 euros pour les AAA Xbox et PlayStation. Microsoft fait marche arrière avec les prochains jeux Fable et Gears of War.

item.title: Le grand bluff des hybrides rechargeables ? Une étude prouve qu’elles rejettent 5 fois plus de CO2 que prévu
item.description: Vendus comme un compromis idéal entre le thermique et l’électrique, les véhicules hybrides rechargeables émettraient en réalité cinq fois plus de CO2 que prévu. Le comportement des automobilistes en serait la cause principale.

item.title: Think you know your Woody from your Buzz? Put your Pixar knowledge to the test with this challenging Toy Story quiz
item.description: Before you see Toy Story 5 at your local cinema, see if you can answer every question correctly in our tough Toy Story quiz.

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs Egypt: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Belgium vs Egypt for free online and from anywhere in Group G of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Best of Summer Game Fest 2026 — all the biggest, most exciting, and most innovative things on show that we loved
item.description: We run down the seven most exciting things that we saw at Summer Game Fest 2026.

item.title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on wine if France wont drop tech tax
item.description: Trump threatened 100% tariffs on French wine unless France drops its tech tax on U.S. companies, per a New York Post exclusive ahead of the G7.

item.title: Roblox exec says ticking a box for age verification is ‘not enough anymore’
item.description: Roblox's vice president of safety product policy, Eliza Jacobs, told NBC News that Roblox is "optimistic" that its new facial age estimation tech will "continue to get better," saying, "Ticking a box to say you're 13 or older, it's not enough anymore." NBC invited a group of kids to try out Roblox's new video selfie […]

item.title: Before Prime Day, the Aiper Scuba V3 robot pool cleaner is down to a record-low price
item.description: The Aiper Scuba V3 robot pool cleaner is on sale at Amazon for $849.97, down from the normal price of $1,399.99. That's a 39% discount.

item.title: Think you know everything about Raccoon City? See if you can survive to the end of my ultimate Resident Evil movie quiz
item.description: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil is the next chapter of the zombie horror franchise. But how well do you know the previous movies?

item.title: Brain experts tell the UK government there's 'very little' scientific evidence that phones are harming kids — but a social media ban is going ahead anyway
item.description: A few words from the academics speaking at the Science, Innovation and Technology Committee in the House of Parliament.

item.title: Amazon lance l’avant-première de son Prime Day : voici les 12 meilleures offres Tech à saisir
item.description: Alors oui, le Prime Day ne commence officiellement que le 23 juin. Mais Amazon n'a pas pu s'empêcher de lancer les hostilités un peu plus tôt ! Si vous êtes membre Prime, le géant américain a déjà glissé quelques pépites en ligne. On a fait le tri et on vous a dégoté les bonnes affaires qui valent vraiment le coup.

item.title: My favorite digital photo frame just got the Google Photos integration I've been waiting years for — and it's super easy to set up
item.description: Aura makes some of the best digital photo frames — including my favorite, the Walden — which now support Google Photos, iCloud, text message and Aura app uploads (and more), making them easier than ever to use

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for June 15
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on June 15, including the day's schedule, kickoff times, and livestream information.

item.title: 'The last thing any of us want': Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warns AI dominance could 'hollow out entire industries'
item.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella cautions against giving AI models too much control and information.

item.title: Buzzy tech IPOs are overwhelming retail trading platforms
item.description: Retail investors reportedly requested $100 billion in shares. But as trading platforms strained under demand, many mom-and-pop buyers were allocated only a tiny fraction of what they asked for. SpaceX’s initial public offering lived up to expectations, making Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire and minting more than 4,000 millionaires in an instant as the stock price blew past its asking price and kept rising—up 27% in the first few hours of trading....

item.title: Every Year After fans have 'laundry list' of complaints after Prime Video drops Carley Fortune adaptation — and they're outright refusing rumored season 2
item.description: Every Year After on Prime Video has gone down really well with fans, right? Wrong... so much so that they don't even want a rumored second season.

item.title: Open-source Discord alternatives: What Stoat and Element actually fix
item.description: Hosting your own group chat could let you avoid a lot of drama.

item.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
item.description: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export control restrictions on Anthropic’s models Fable and Mythos, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.

item.title: IShowSpeed had no idea he was sitting next to NYC Mayor Mamdani at the World Cup
item.description: IShowSpeed was sitting right next to New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani at the World Cup. He had no clue.

item.title: Test de la Segway Navimow i208 LiDAR : la tonte sans fil enfin simple, mais gare aux bordures
item.description: Le marché des robots tondeuses sans fil périmétrique explose, et Segway entend bien tondre la concurrence. La Navimow i208 LiDAR arrive avec une promesse forte : une installation simplifiée et une tonte intelligente grâce à son capteur LiDAR et à sa caméra, le tout pour un rapport qualité-prix très séduisant. Ces arguments sont-ils suffisants pour surpasser les mastodontes du secteur comme Mammotion ou des nouveaux challengers comme Dreame et Ecovacs ? Réponse dans ce test complet. ...

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Xbox Game Studios chief reportedly steps down as layoffs loom
item.description: Things continue to look grim for Xbox as layoffs loom and Craig Duncan steps down.

item.title: Emmanuel Macron réunit OpenAI, Anthropic et Google DeepMind à l’occasion du G7
item.description: Pour son G7, Emmanuel Macron a réussi un joli coup de casting : les patrons d'OpenAI, de Google DeepMind et d'Anthropic réunis au bord du Léman. La France y joue son rang de futur pôle européen de l'intelligence artificielle, avec des milliards venus surtout d'ailleurs.

item.title: EA created an entire division to push more in-game ads
item.description: EA is making a big push for more in-game advertising.

item.title: Vibe coding can build your pipeline. It can't explain it six months later
item.description: AI coding agents are rapidly accelerating data engineering by generating transformations, pipelines, orchestration workflows, validation tests, and infrastructure configurations from prompts. However, enterprise data platforms have long operated across fragmented systems owned by different teams and built on different technologies. As these systems evolve independently, organizations increasingly struggle with inconsistent business logic, duplicated implementations, difficult downstream impact analysis, and hidden dependencies across the platform. The rise of vibe coding can further amplify th...

item.title: Early Prime Day gaming monitor deal: This dazzling ASUS ROG Strix OLED pick is down to its best price ever
item.description: The ASUS 34-inch ROG Strix Ultrawide OLED gaming monitor is on sale at Amazon for just $649 before Prime Day — its best price ever.

item.title: Fox to buy Roku in $22 billion streaming deal
item.description: America's corporate consolidation trend continues unabated, with Fox acquiring Roku for its streaming expertise.

item.title: House of the Dragon review: Season 3 atones for the sins of Season 2
item.description: After a disappointing Season 2 finale, "House of the Dragon" roars back with a vengeance in Season 3. TV review.

item.title: Samsung MAX VPN goes offline today, leaving Android users searching for alternatives
item.description: Samsung MAX VPN is officially shutting down today. Here's why the privacy app is retiring, how it impacts your Galaxy device, and what you should do next to stay secure online.

item.title: La Nintendo Switch 2 est en forte promotion : faut-il craquer avant la hausse tarifaire prévue en septembre ?
item.description: La Nintendo Switch 2 est la dernière console de la firme japonaise, dotée d'un écran plus grand et plus lumineux, tout en étant plus puissante. Son prix va augmenter en septembre 2026, mais on la trouve en ce moment à 382,47 euros au lieu de 469 euros chez AliExpress. Elle est aussi à 399 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Samsungs 49-inch Odyssey G9 monitor just hit its lowest price ever
item.description: Get the Samsung 49-inch Odyssey G9 Curved Gaming Monitor for just $664.99 before Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: TikTok and YouTube will be banned for kids under 16 in Britain, says PM Starmer
item.description: The ban is expected to begin in early 2027. Britain will ban children under 16 from using a range of social media apps including Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube to protect young people from harmful content and excessive screen time, Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Monday,Starmer told a news conference that he will fight back if technology companies resist the move, and acknowledged some teens would try to find their way around a ban. But he said he is “not prepared to compromise on the safety and happiness of our children.”“Every parent can see it with their own eyes. Social media is making chil...

item.title: SpaceX’s biggest-ever IPO just grew to $85.7 billion raised
item.description: SpaceX's IPO underwriters maxed out their share purchases, adding to an already historic amount of money raised.

item.title: My favorite Qi2 power bank is cheaper than ever for Verge readers
item.description: I recently published a buying guide on the best Qi2 power banks. Out of seven feature-packed batteries, I really dug the Baseus AM52 10,000mAh power bank that has a built-in USB-C cable. It’s fast at Qi2.2 wireless charging for iPhones, and it’s quick with wired charging, too. And now, it’s an unbeatable value thanks to […]

item.title: Compact, puissant avec sa puce A19 et enfin compatible MagSafe, l’iPhone 17e est en plus en promo à moins de 670 €
item.description: Avec l'iPhone 17e, Apple propose un smartphone d'entrée de gamme qui mise sur l'essentiel, à retrouver pour 669,99 euros au lieu de 719 euros sur Joybuy.

item.title: Le Royaume-Uni va bientôt interdire les réseaux sociaux aux moins de 16 ans
item.description: Le Premier ministre Keir Starmer a annoncé un projet de loi interdisant les réseaux sociaux aux moins de 16 ans, dont l'entrée en vigueur est prévue pour 2027. Cette initiative s'inscrit dans un mouvement mondial : d'autres pays, comme l'Espagne et la France, envisagent également des mesures similaires pour protéger les plus jeunes.

item.title: UK unveils sweeping social media ban for users under 16
item.description: The ban would apply to a range of social media platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

item.title: Novo Nordisk reveals cyberattack: Ozempic and Wegovy maker says clinical trials data breached
item.description: The company says the data is pseudonymous and apparently can't be linked to actual people.

item.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
item.description: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

item.title: Why UK data sovereignty is the next competitive advantage for digital industries
item.description: Learn how sovereign cloud protects UK IP while accelerating collaboration across critical digital industries.

item.title: MSI confirme nos craintes : les consoles de jeux deviennent hors de prix
item.description: La nouvelle console MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ sera bel et bien commercialisée à 1800 dollars. Un prix très élevé pour une console de jeu.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs. Cape Verde online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Spain vs. Cape Verde in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: The best deals this week, according to Mashables team of shopping experts
item.description: The best deals this week. Mashable's shoping team finds deals on AirPods, Pokémon cards, robot vacuums, and so much more.

item.title: The Verge’s Father’s Day 2026 gift guide
item.description: With Father's Day on the horizon, happening June 21st, it's time to start thinking about what kind of gifts you want to buy for the fathers you care about. You know your dad best - he may be a man of simple pleasures who wants nothing more than to share a meal or drinks with […]
